subject: [PATCH v6 07/22] mm: create scaffolds for the new virtual swap implementation

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch adds scaffolding code for virtual swap implementation, including a new source file mm/vswap.c and modifications to the Makefile and other files. The new code sets up a debugfs directory for virtual swap but does not introduce any behavioral changes yet. It also adds Johannes Weiner as a reviewer for virtual swap development.
